orig_text: The following figure shows the data fields format for enhanced Alternate-Marking TLV (AltMark). This AltMark data can be encapsulated in the IPv6 Options Headers (Hop-by-Hop or Destination Option).
correct_text: The following figure shows the data fields format for Alternate-Marking TLV (AltMark). This AltMark data can be encapsulated in the IPv6 Options Headers (Hop-by-Hop or Destination Option).
notes:
See the OPSAWG email archive at https://mailarchive.ietf.org/arch/msg/opsawg/U_E2jSyR2aBoFdipMIQZ-wV3xZc/

[Benoit Claise] I am confused because there are mutliple flavors of AltMark, and I recall one being called "enhanced" (IIRC, in the context of RFC 9947). However, "enhanced" is mentioned a single time in RFC9343. Is this a leftover? Worth an editorial errata?

[Giuseppe Foccola]: Yes, it is an editorial errata. Feel free to report it.
